title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Medanta

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Medanta
jsonLd.description:
We at Medanta are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Gurgaon. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Medanta:
Medanta is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medanta!
